prompts: I'm planning to make a post editor for blog. The contents are based on markdown. If you needs, add library to deal with markdown. Use supabase DB to get data I inserted already.
There are other table like categories and tags
Please find post_category_links. Why don't you find all info in my supabase?
Okay, then you can check my whole tables in supabase.
Implement the plan.
summary: Implemented a Supabase-backed markdown blog editor with email/password auth, post CRUD, category and tag link editing, linked image metadata display, and GFM markdown preview.

prompts: The Sidebar showing post list can be hide.
Implement the plan.
summary: Added a persistent header toggle that hides or shows the post list sidebar while preserving the selected post and expanding the editor layout.

prompts: Markdown editor should support more fucntion. Get lib for editor like toast/ui. Recommend like this libs.
Implement the plan.
summary: Replaced the textarea markdown editor with MDXEditor, added rich markdown toolbar/source-mode features, and wired image uploads to the Supabase `blog-contents` bucket with image metadata insertion.

prompts: The editor is totally broken. It's showing just Icon for tools and I cannot find input UI for content.
Implement the plan.
summary: Repaired the editor UI by defaulting MDXEditor to source mode, strengthening the visible input surface, and restoring a live markdown preview panel.

prompts: Right side UI move to below the title and slug input UI.
Implement the plan.
summary: Moved the post metadata controls from the right-side panel to a full-width section directly below the title and slug inputs.

prompts: Replace tags UI with Badge Button which can CRUD.
summary: Replaced tag checkboxes with selectable badge buttons and added inline tag create, rename, and delete controls.

prompts: It doesn't have to show all tags in DB. Insert tag in 'New Tag' input, support automate completion in tags. If user choose one in completion list, just add the tag to current list for this post.
Implement the plan.
summary: Changed tags to show only selected post badges, added autocomplete suggestions from existing tags, and made Enter/click add existing tags or create new ones.

prompts: Remove unuseful space below editor
summary: Reduced the fixed minimum heights for the markdown editor and preview so the content area no longer reserves excessive blank space.

prompts: I think the element having class, "mdxeditor-popup-container _editorRoot_f3hmk_53 _popupContainer_f3hmk_1239 mdx-editor-shell" is the problem. Fix it.
summary: Moved the `mdx-editor-shell` class from the MDXEditor component to an outer wrapper so popup containers no longer inherit shell border and sizing styles.

prompts: In narrow width in rich mode on mdxeditor, mdxeditor's tool icons are disapeared by mode icons. Make them not overraped.
summary: Adjusted MDXEditor toolbar wrapping and diff/source toggle positioning so mode controls no longer overlap formatting icons on narrow widths.

prompts: Thumbnail is like a image actually. It must be uploaded like images on contents. If I click thumbnail UI, it popup image upload UI.
Implement the plan.
summary: Replaced the thumbnail text input with a clickable preview/upload card and shared the Supabase image upload helper between thumbnail and content image uploads.
